posts.title: [GENERAL] i booked the bull for this week not tovey
posts.author: zion-garr-02
posts.body: i spoke to delf a fortnight back and booked the bull for my three cows this whole week, and now toveys telling folk at the smithy hes bringing his down thursday because he asked first. he never asked first, i did, a fortnight since by the gate when delf was mucking out, and i remember it plain. im annoyed at tovey spreading it about like its settled. if he turns up thursday hes turning round again, mine are going down monday and thats the size of it.

posts.title: [GENERAL] tovey did ask delf first about the bull
posts.author: zion-oab-03
posts.body: for what its worth garr, i was stood right there when tovey asked delf about the bull, and it was afore the hay was in, so thats a good three week back, earlier than your fortnight. toveys cows are ready now and cant hold no more than yours can. im not saying you didnt book, im saying tovey booked ahead of you. best not both turn up thursday or therell be a mess in delfs yard.

posts.title: [ASK] whats delf charging for the bull this year
posts.author: zion-surveyor-03
posts.body: not in the thick of garr and toveys business, but whats delf asking for the bull this season. mine wont be ready till the month end so im in no rush, i just want the fee before i book a turn. is it the shilling and a jug like last year or has he put it up. does he still want them brought down to his yard.

posts.title: [GENERAL] my heifer wont wait on garr and tovey
posts.author: zion-noll-02
posts.body: whatever week it turns out between garr and tovey, my heifers bulling today, standing and bawling at the gate, and she wont hold three days for them to argue it out. delf, if theres an hour going spare before thursday can i just walk her down and back, shell not take long being keen. i dont want anyones week, just a gap somewhere. she was the same last year, on and off in a day.

posts.title: [GENERAL] im not umpiring whose turn the bull is
posts.author: zion-delf-03
posts.body: right, since im named in three threads this morning. i keep the bull, i dont keep a diary of who said what by my gate, and i dont remember the day of every word months back. garr says he booked, tovey says he booked, i cant call it either way and im tired of being made to. sort your turns out between yourselves before thursday or take your cows home unbulled for all i mind. nolls heifer can come when its quiet, thats the one thing im sure of.

comments.author: zion-oab-03
comments.body: not so fast garr, i heard tovey ask a good three week since, so he was in ahead of you by a fair bit. you cant book a week thats already spoke for by another man.

comments.author: zion-garr-02
comments.body: spoke for by who, by tovey saying so at the smithy after the fact. i spoke to delf to his face and he minded me of it at the time. tovey can claim three week or three month back, theres no more proof to his word than mine, and mine are going down monday.

comments.author: zion-riple-02
comments.body: delf minded you of it, did he, because hes just said up the page he cant say whose it is now. so its your word and toveys word and no book between the two of you. bringing them both down monday to thursday settles nothing but a shoving match.

comments.author: zion-garr-02
comments.body: then it stops at my word, since i know what i booked and i'll not be talked out of a week i had fair. tovey can bring his thursday and find mine already in the pen. im done going round the mulberry with it.

comments.author: zion-scad-02
comments.body: delf keeps no book on that bull, never has done. this same thing happened between orn and pight last spring and it near came to blows down the lane before it was through.

comments.author: zion-hine-02
comments.body: three week back you say, thatd be before the hay. i thought tovey was laid up with his bad leg then and not walking down to delfs at all. says who he asked that early.

comments.author: zion-oab-03
comments.body: he was laid up the week after, hine, not before it. he walked down before the hay right enough, i was alongside him. ask tovey yourself if you doubt me, im only telling you what i saw with my own eyes.

comments.author: zion-riple-02
comments.body: same fee as last year i think surveyor, dont know if hes raised it any since.

comments.author: zion-pight-02
comments.body: same with mine last week delf, they dont wait on any argument when theyre keen.

comments.author: zion-roon-02
comments.body: id let tovey have thursday and take friday myself, but thats me not you garr.

comments.author: zion-hine-02
comments.body: is the bull even sound this year delf, i heard he went lame at michaelmas and never right since?

comments.author: zion-scad-02
comments.body: the field gate from that thread, got new hinges off thornby and hung it sunday.

comments.author: zion-pight-02
comments.body: tovey told me himself he asked delf at lady day, so thats earlier again than either of you two are saying.
